_comment_hypothesis: Optional. One-sentence expectation written when launching the run (e.g., 'Higher lr with warmup should reach lower val_loss faster'). Tools must not require this field. Pair with `outcome` (filled at completion) for retrospective narrative; both fields exist only to enrich /train-compare reports — absence is normal.
_comment_code: Filled by run skills at create_run.code_snapshot via lifecycle/scripts/shared/code_snapshot.py. SHA + dirty_patch_path is the reproduction contract: `git checkout <origin_commit> && git apply <run_dir>/<dirty_patch_path>`.

lineage._comment_variation_summary: Auto-computed when fork_of is set. Short human-readable diff of runtime_params vs the fork_of base, e.g., 'lr: 1e-4 → 2e-4; warmup_ratio: 0 → 0.03'. Null when fork_of is null. /train-run fills this at create_run time; tools may regenerate it from snapshots if missing.
lineage._comment_session: Optional. Set by /train-tune when this run is part of an adaptive HPO session. Format: '<YYYYMMDD>_<HHMMSS>_<slug>', matches the session directory name under stages/training/tune_sessions/. Null for ad-hoc runs (manual /train-run invocations not part of any tune session).

_comment_runtime_state: Streaming-state fields (used by long-running skills like /train-run). last_heartbeat: ISO timestamp updated periodically while alive — agents detect hung jobs when (now - last_heartbeat) exceeds expected interval. last_step: most recent step number observed in the jsonl stream — lets agents read ETA without re-tailing the whole log; null for stages without step concept. latest_metrics: most recent streaming snapshot (e.g., last val_epoch's key fields) — distinct from `metrics` which holds the final/terminal numbers populated on completion.
_comment_outputs: Canonical artifact paths produced by this run, relative to <run_dir>. Filled by run skills at finalize. Per-stage conventions: training fills best_checkpoint / last_checkpoint / train_log / config_yaml; eval fills report / metrics_json; infer fills predictions / etc. Downstream skills (e.g. /eval-run consuming a train run's best ckpt) read these instead of re-deriving paths from config conventions.
_comment_outcome: Optional. Free-text retrospective written when the run terminates, e.g., 'Refuted. val_loss 0.234 → 0.241 (+3%), convergence epoch 87 → 92'. Pairs with `hypothesis`. Tools must not require this; null is normal.
